text: Implemented DMat/DVec builderFrom and toBuilder one-copy ownership transfer; strided matrix slice views; owned repeated-index gathers; DVec.gather; rectangular addToDiagonal; explicit symmetrizedAverage; allocation-free foreach traversal; caller-owned primitive array copy APIs; and public docs. Cross-platform storage-identity tests prove source/result non-aliasing and builder/result adoption of the same single allocated handle. Verification: focused DenseTransformSuite 8/8 JVM and 8/8 JS; full coreJVM 443/443 and coreJS 440/440.
